description: AI model capability and pricing trends. Updated each RESEARCH scan.

current_leaderboard.notes: First model to natively surpass human performance on OSWorld (75% vs 72.4% human)
Powers Vigil ADVISOR. Strong long-horizon planning.
Leaked March 26-27. Confirmed by Anthropic. Step change above Opus. Cybersecurity focus for early access.

snapshots.notes: No new Vigil model changes this scan. Mythos on watch for future upgrade path.

key_observations: Computer use is now standard capability (both GPT-5.4 and Claude Code)
14.5-hour task horizon (Opus 4.6) signals agentic work replacing human-hour tasks
Claude Mythos represents another step change; likely Q2-Q3 2026 release
Open source (Llama 4) within striking distance of frontier models
trends.vigil_implication: Current stack is solid. No urgent upgrade needed. Watch for Mythos API access for SECURE and ADVISOR workstream improvements.
